title: Processors, Parallel Processing and Virtual Machines
summary: 9618 A Level — CPU architecture extensions, parallelism, and virtualisation.
learningObjectives: Explain pipelining in the fetch–execute cycle.
Evaluate benefits and overheads of virtualisation.

simpleExplanation.title: More throughput from one machine
simpleExplanation.summary: Pipelining overlaps instruction stages. Multiple cores run threads in parallel. VMs run guest OSes on shared hardware.
steps: SIMD: same operation on many data items.

sections.content: **Parallel processing** (15.1) extends **4.1 CPU architecture**. Use the **interactive logic builder** to visualise multi-stage processing.
